headline: BreachRx Appoints Stephen Garcia as Chief Information Security Officer
summary: Veteran security leader to advance platform trust, bring frontline CISO perspective to product development, and help shape industry understanding of AI-driven threats Stephen Garcia Headshot Stephen Garcia, Chief Information Security Officer of BreachRx SAN FRANCISCO, June 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BreachRx, the leader in cyber incident response management (CIRM), today announced the appointment of Stephen Garcia as Chief Information Security Officer (CISO). Garcia will lead BreachRx’s intern
